cuts.reason: Same dawn-corral fade-in as A (shared Phase D source). Holds through vo-intro-B (credentials + product framing — no contrarian question).
Differentiate from A: B opens market arc with sunrise clouds (vs A's cattle-grazing). 'Beef · record highs' on a hopeful sky reads more ironic than the literal grazing shot.
Cowboy silhouette under 'Cow herd · 65-yr low'. The lone-figure framing carries the depopulation beat — not labor-gone yet, that's next.
'Labor · gone' over a single rancher walking his horse. Reads as 'the work that's left is on him alone'. Mid-grade dust palette.
Storm cell on horizon under 'Eyes · fewer per acre'. The ambient threat layer — reinforces why 24/7 coverage is the actual product, not the metric.

Hold 'rancher does not' line over the rancher-couple sunset. Differentiates from A's herd-countryside pick — B's market arc closes on the human cost, not the herd-rancher gap. Subtler emotional register.
Tight 4s bridge (vs A's 5s) since vo-bridge-B is only 'So we built one. Watch.' — 2s of VO. The brevity is the point.
Same substance close as A. Three text blocks: tests, ed25519 chain, fresh-clone repro.
